Senior Platform Engineer

Example Corp is hiring a Senior Platform Engineer to design and operate our cloud infrastructure. You will work with Kubernetes, Python, and Terraform to automate deployments, improve observability, and mentor junior engineers. We expect five or more years of experience building reliable systems, strong communication skills, and enthusiasm for DevOps culture.

Responsibilities include on-call rotation, incident response, capacity planning, and partnering with product teams on reliability goals. You should be comfortable reading and writing infrastructure-as-code, securing CI/CD pipelines, and documenting runbooks for operational excellence across teams.
